title: Crucible Acceptance Recipe
description: Declares how to deterministically build, boot, and drive a repo's real artifact, plus the trust audit of its mocked boundaries.

build.description: Build the shippable artifact (not a test build).

boot.description: Launch the real app and probe readiness; the oracle is the real ready signal.

drive.description: Real end-to-end flows against real/recorded inputs with real oracles.

testRoots.description: Repo-relative directories to scan for test files.

testPattern.description: Regex a test file path must match.

mockMarkers.description: Substrings that mark a file as crossing a mocked boundary.

cmd.description: Shell command run at the repo root (or cwd).

cwd.description: Repo-relative working directory. Defaults to the repo root.

timeoutSec.description: Hard timeout; exceeding it is a failure (exit 124).

stdoutMatch.description: Regex that must appear in output for success.

stdoutForbid.description: Regex that must NOT appear (e.g. panic markers).
